name: Indo Tech Transformers Limited
summary: Indo Tech Transformers Limited manufactures and sells transformers in India and internationally. It offers power, distribution, and special application transformers, as well as mobile sub-station transformers and sub-stations for use in the generation, transmission, and distribution of electric power. The company was founded in 1976 and is based in Kancheepuram, India. Indo Tech Transformers Limited operates as a subsidiary of Prolec GE, S. de R.L. de C.V.
